MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT MORENO, MARIA AKA MORENO, MARIA T. TORRES HEARING SET FOR MAR-05-2007 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY&COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MORENO, MARIA AKA MORENO, MARIA T. TORRES $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $60.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,060.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
BY AGREEMENT OF THE PARTIES, JUDGMENT SHALL BE PAYABLE IN INSTALLMENT OF $60 PER MO, COMMENCING ON 3/30/07 & CONTINUING ON THE 30TH OF EACH MONTH
THEREAFTER, UNTIL FULLY PAID. IF ANY PAYMENT IS MISSED, THE ENTIRE BALANCE BECOMES DUE IMMEDIATELY
